descriptions: Ghetto Brothers called a peace meeting attended by Black Pearls.
edges.evidence_quote: It took place on December 8, 1971, and was attended by two hundred representatives from dozens of Bronx gangs, including the Black Pearls, Black Spades, Dirty Dozens, Dutchmen, Latin Spades, Liberated Panthers, Magnificent Seven, Peacemakers, Royal Javelins, Savage Skulls, Seven Immortals, Turbans, and Young Sinners, together with police and city officials.

descriptions: The paramilitary wing was reorganised as ERP before MPCP's formal establishment.
edges.evidence_quote: Under the leadership of Víctor Quispe Palomino , it was reorganised as the Popular Revolutionary Army ( Spanish : Ejército Popular Revolucionario ; ERP ) until the MPCP's formal establishment

descriptions: After MPCP's formal establishment, the paramilitary wing claimed the name Revolutionary Armed Forces of Peru.
edges.evidence_quote: after which it has claimed the name of Revolutionary Armed Forces of Peru ( Spanish : Fuerzas armadas revolucionarias del Perú ).

descriptions: MPCP is the main remaining faction of Shining Path, but distanced itself from Shining Path's legacy in 2018.
edges.evidence_quote: The main remaining faction of the Shining Path, the Militarized Communist Party of Peru ( MPCP ), is active in the VRAEM region of Peru, and it has since distanced itself from the Shining Path's legacy in 2018

descriptions: MPCP is a splinter group of Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: The main remaining group, called the Militarized Communist Party of Peru (MPCP) of about 300 individuals remained in the Valle de los Ríos Apurímac, Ene y Mantaro (VRAEM) region.

descriptions: Lopers 13 and Walnut Street are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Walnut street, Logan street

descriptions: The AZ Syndicate and the Berman Brothers were rivals for control of Minneapolis's criminal underworld.
edges.evidence_quote: FBI files reveal that rival Minneapolis Jewish mob boss David Berman contributed very heavily to Marvin L. Kline 's mayoral campaign under the understanding that Berman would receive a monopoly over illegal gambling in Minneapolis. Therefore, during Kline's 1941–1945 term as Mayor, Berman briefly eclipsed the Blumenfelds and became the leader of the Minneapolis criminal underworld.

descriptions: Hurras Al-Din was formed by Al-Qaeda loyalists after Al-Nusra broke ties with Al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Qaeda loyalists ... mobilised Al-Qaeda personnel ... eventually forming Hurras Al-Din

descriptions: Hurras al-Din was a former affiliate of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Hurras al-Din (dissolved in 2025)

descriptions: Hurras al-Din was a former group (affiliate) of al-Qaeda until 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: Former groups: ... Hurras al-Din (until 2025)

descriptions: Hurras al-Din was a former group under Al-Qaeda until 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: Former groups: ... Hurras al-Din , (until 2025)

descriptions: Hurras al-Din was a former group of al-Qaeda until 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: Former groups: ... Hurras al-Din (until 2025)

descriptions: Both groups received protection from Salvadoran officials, but no direct relationship between them is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: the United Nations confirmed that the Texis Cartel, along with the Los Perrones drug trafficking group, had received protection from Salvadoran government officials.

edges.target: Knights of the Ku Klux Klan
descriptions: IKA founder Ron Edwards was previously head of a klavern of the Knights of the Ku Klux Klan before breaking away.
edges.evidence_quote: In July 1994, he joined the short-lived Federation of Klans after it broke away from the Knights of the KKK

edges.source: Knights of the Ku Klux Klan
edges.target: California Knights of the Ku Klux Klan
descriptions: California Knights was founded by Metzger after leaving the national Klan.
edges.evidence_quote: Metzger left the national organization and founded his own organization, the California Knights of the Ku Klux Klan.

edges.target: Knights of the Ku Klux Klan
descriptions: Metzger left White Brotherhood to join Knights of the Ku Klux Klan.
edges.evidence_quote: Metzger's first group was known as the White Brotherhood, which he led in the mid-1970s until he joined David Duke's Knights of the Ku Klux Klan in 1975.

descriptions: La Barra Del Rojo has had major confrontations with La 12, the barra brava of Boca Juniors.
edges.evidence_quote: it also had major confrontations with the barras bravas of Boca Juniors (La 12)

descriptions: Alwiya al-Furqan is listed as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Alwiya al-Furqan

descriptions: Ahrar al-Sham jointly took part in attacks with Alwiya al-Furqan.
edges.evidence_quote: Ahrar al-Sham along with other Free Syrian Army-aligned factions including the Jesus Son of Mary Battalions and Alwiya al-Furqan jointly took part in the ISIL-led attacks code named 'Volcano of Rage'

Green Street Counts.description: The Green Street Counts were a street gang in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, active in the early 1950s. Their turf centered at 21st and Green Streets, and they specialized in armed robbery, kidnapping, and weapons dealings. A separate, unaffiliated group also operated under the same name in West Philadelphia. Member Joseph 'Blackie' Battel received a life sentence for a robbery murder, later commuted.

descriptions: The Green Street Counts connected with the K&A Gang after release from prison.
edges.evidence_quote: After their release the Counts would later connect with the K&A Gang of Philadelphia's Kensington section.

descriptions: Midland Outlaws amalgamated with Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws expanded into the United Kingdom in February 2000 after amalgamating the Midland Outlaws, an independent club which had been in existence since 1992.

'Ndrina Ferrazzo.description: The 'Ndrina Ferrazzo is a 'ndrina (criminal clan) of the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria, Italy, influential in Petilia Policastro and Mesoraca, province of Crotone. It is involved in arms and drug trafficking, money laundering in tourism and real estate, and has operations in Sardinia, Lombardy, Abruzzo, Molise, Switzerland, and Spain. The clan has alliances with other 'ndrine in the Catanzaro area.

descriptions: 'Ndrina Ferrazzo is a subunit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Ferrazzo è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: 'Ndrina Ferrazzo made agreements with clans from Crotone and Lombardy.
edges.evidence_quote: sarebbero stati realizzati accordi con clan del Crotonese e della Lombardia

descriptions: 'Ndrina Ferrazzo made agreements with clans from Lombardy.
edges.evidence_quote: sarebbero stati realizzati accordi con clan del Crotonese e della Lombardia

descriptions: 'Ndrina Ferrazzo was in opposition to the clan operating in the Neto Valley.
time_periods: tra gli anni Ottanta e Novanta
edges.evidence_quote: in contrapposizione con la cosca che operava nella Valle del Neto

descriptions: 'Ndrina Ferrazzo has alliances with clans from the Catanzaro area.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha alleanze con le cosche dell'area catanzarese

descriptions: Ferrazzo is listed as an allied 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Ferrazzo ( Mesoraca )

descriptions: The text states Pane-Iazzolino are allies of Ferrazzo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , con i Ferrazzo di Mesoraca e con i Farao-Marincola di Cirò .

descriptions: Cannonball and Overkill MC were aligned against Undertakers MC during the Nordic Biker War.
edges.evidence_quote: As a Hells Angels support club, Cannonball was aligned with the HA prospect chapter Overkill MC against the Undertakers MC, a prospect club of the Bandidos, during the Nordic Biker War in the 1990s.

descriptions: Overkill MC patched over to Hells Angels in 1996.
edges.evidence_quote: Overkill and the Undertakers patched over to the Hells Angels and Bandidos, respectively

descriptions: Overkill MC and Undertakers MC were on opposing sides in the Nordic Biker War.
edges.evidence_quote: As a Hells Angels support club, Cannonball was aligned with the HA prospect chapter Overkill MC against the Undertakers MC, a prospect club of the Bandidos, during the Nordic Biker War in the 1990s.

descriptions: Ba Thế, along with other kings, ambushed Đại Cathay, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: As they were not pleased with Đại Cathay's rapid expansion in Saigon, so they decided to try to take down Đại in an ambush.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was hostile to the cartel formed by Fusco-Ponticelli and Sarno.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan De Luca Bossa fu ostile al cartello formato dai clan Fusco-Ponticelli e Sarno.

descriptions: George Street conducted successful hits against Southside leaders.
edges.evidence_quote: The late 2000s is thought to have been a boon to the gang, allegedly culminating in successful hits against leaders of rival gangs ( Southside , Brick City, Ghost Town ) in 2010.

descriptions: Members of the Spada and Spinelli families were arrested together in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: L'operazione vede l'impiego di circa 150 agenti ... e le altre a membri delle famiglie Spada ... Di Silvio e Spinelli

descriptions: Members of the Spinelli clan raided a Casamonica villa, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 21 aprile 2020 alla Romanina un gruppo composto da membri del clan Spinelli fa irruzione, scagliandosi contro una lussuosa villa ... abitata da altri Casamonica.

descriptions: Members of the Spinelli family were arrested alongside Casamonica members in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: L'operazione vede l'impiego di circa 150 agenti ... e le altre a membri delle famiglie Spada ... Di Silvio e Spinelli

descriptions: Members of the Di Silvio and Spinelli families were arrested together in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: L'operazione vede l'impiego di circa 150 agenti ... e le altre a membri delle famiglie Spada ... Di Silvio e Spinelli

Rathkeale Rovers.description: The Rathkeale Rovers are a criminal group based in Ireland but operating internationally, composed of members of Ireland's Travelling Community. Originating from Rathkeale, Ireland, the gang was started by Simon Quilligan ("Sammy Buckshot") and later led by the O'Brien family. They are known for fraud, money laundering, drug smuggling, and art theft, notably stealing rhino horns and Chinese antiquities. Europol and international agencies have investigated them, leading to multiple arrests and convictions.

Os Manos.description: One of the two largest criminal organizations in Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil, alongside Bala na Cara (BNC). Founded in 1990 inside the Central Prison of Porto Alegre by Dilonei Melara, it originated from the Falange Gaúcha. The group is heavily involved in drug trafficking, robberies, money laundering, and other violent crimes, and has expanded to neighboring states and countries like Uruguay and Paraguay. It is considered the largest criminal faction in the state.

descriptions: Bala na Cara and Os Manos are the two largest criminal organizations in Rio Grande do Sul, mentioned as comparable entities.
edges.evidence_quote: Bala na Cara ( BNC ), conhecidos também por Os Leão , Os Ta No Chão ou 2.13.3 , é uma das duas maiores organizações criminosas do Rio Grande do Sul , ao lado de Os Manos .

descriptions: Os Manos and Bala na Cara are the two largest criminal organizations in Rio Grande do Sul, implicitly rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Os Manos é uma das duas maiores organizações criminosas do Rio Grande do Sul , no Brasil , ao lado dos Bala na Cara (BNC)

descriptions: Infobox lists BNC as a rival of Os Manos.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: Both Os Manos and Brasas originated inside the same prison, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Dentro do presídio, originaram-se também os Brasas, outra facção criminosa.

descriptions: Infobox lists Cebolas as a rival of Os Manos.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: Infobox lists CNG as a rival of Os Manos.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: Infobox lists CV as a rival of Os Manos.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: Infobox lists Os Aberto as a rival of Os Manos.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: Infobox lists Os Tauras as a rival of Os Manos.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: Os Manos and PCC have established an alliance since approximately 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: Aproximadamente desde 2017, Os Manos e o PCC têm estabelecido uma aliança

descriptions: Infobox lists PCC as an ally of Os Manos.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , PGC

descriptions: Infobox lists PGC as an ally of Os Manos.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , PGC

descriptions: Infobox lists V7 as a rival of Os Manos.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: V7 and Os Manos initially had a non-aggression pact, but later went to war over unpaid debts.
edges.evidence_quote: Os V7 entraram em guerra contra Os Manos por conta de dividas que não foram pagas, no inicio as duas facções tinham um acordo de 'não se agredir', estando neutra uma a outra, mas por conta das dividas e dos desacertos romperam o acordo.

descriptions: V7 and Os Manos had a non-aggression pact initially.
edges.evidence_quote: no inicio as duas facções tinham um acordo de 'não se agredir', estando neutra uma a outra

'Ndrina Labate.description: A powerful 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta in Reggio Calabria, allied with the Tegano clan. It operates in the neighborhoods of Gebbione, Rione Ferrovieri, Sbarre, and Stadio. The clan has been targeted in multiple police operations since 2011, including 'Archi', 'Helianthus', 'Cassa Continua', and 'Las Vegas'. Its leader Pietro Labate was arrested in 2013 and sentenced to 20 years for extortion and mafia association.

descriptions: The Labate 'ndrina is allied with the Tegano 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata dei Tegano

descriptions: Tegano and Labate are mentioned as affiliated cosche.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 aprile 2011 vengono arrestate, durante l'operazione Archi 21 persone presunte affiliate alle cosche Tegano e Labate , tra cui Giuseppe e Bruno Tegano, fratelli di Giovanni Tegano, ne mancano all'appello 5 tra cui il capo dei Labate : Pietro Labate , uscito dal carcere solo un anno prima .

edges.target: Combined Joint Task Force – Operation Inherent Resolve
descriptions: CJTF-OIR conducts military operations against ISIL.
edges.evidence_quote: Operation Inherent Resolve is the operational name given by the US to military operations against ISIL and Syrian al-Qaeda affiliates.

Molluso 'ndrina.description: The Molluso are a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Platì, Italy, with a strong presence in Buccinasco, Lombardy. They have been active in Lombardy since the 1980s and are considered satellite affiliates of the powerful Barbaro-Papalia clans. The historical boss is Giosofatto Molluso. Members have been involved in cocaine trafficking with Turkey and Colombia, and more recently in illegal waste trafficking.

descriptions: Molluso 'ndrina is an ally of Barbaro 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Molluso 'ndrina

descriptions: The Molluso were historically part of the Barbaro group.
edges.evidence_quote: Ai tempi i Barbaro comprendevano anche le 'ndrine dei Perre , Trimboli , Agresta , Catanzariti , Sergi , Papalia , Molluso e Musitano .

descriptions: Infobox lists Molluso 'ndrina as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Molluso 'ndrina

descriptions: Molluso is a sub-unit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Molluso 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Molluso is historically allied with Barbaro.
edges.evidence_quote: The 'ndrina is historically allied to the Barbaro and Papalia 'ndrine

descriptions: Molluso originated as a branch of Barbaro.
edges.evidence_quote: it began as a branch of the powerful Barbaro 'ndrina

descriptions: Molluso is historically allied with Papalia.
edges.evidence_quote: The 'ndrina is historically allied to the Barbaro and Papalia 'ndrine

descriptions: The Molluso family is considered a satellite of the Barbaro-Papalia clan, indicating a subordinate or allied relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: la famiglia Molluso è considerata da sempre «satellite» dei potentissimi Barbaro - Papalia

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina, Papalia 'ndrina, Sergi 'ndrina, Molluso 'ndrina, South American drug cartels

descriptions: Saskatchewan Warriors originally worked for Manitoba Warriors but became a separate affiliated organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Saskatchewan Warriors originally worked for the MW but have become a separate affiliated criminal organization.

descriptions: Kavač clan maintains close links with remainders of Šarić clan.
edges.evidence_quote: "Kavač" OCG maintains close links with remainders of the Šarić clan

descriptions: Šarić gang ousted 'Ndrangheta from the drug market, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2010 it was revealed that the Šarić gang had, from 2008 to 2009, ousted the 'Ndrangheta from the drug market.

descriptions: The Corleonesi were rivals of Giuseppe Di Cristina's faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Giuseppe Di Cristina

descriptions: Foxtrot is allied with Bro-network.
edges.evidence_quote: Additionally, it has been established through numerous investigations that the Foxtrot Network is allied with the Bro-network and Zero Network.

descriptions: The Corleone family supplanted the Palermo families after winning the Second Mafia War.
edges.evidence_quote: growing to the point of supplanting the Palermo families in the 1980s, when it emerged victorious from the Second Mafia War (1981–1982).

Scattered Spider.description: A hacking group mostly made up of teens and young adults believed to live in the United States and the United Kingdom. The group gained notoriety for hacking and extorting Caesars Entertainment and MGM Resorts International in 2023. They are affiliated with the cybercriminal network 'The Com' and have targeted multiple major companies. The group is believed to have been founded in May 2022.

descriptions: Scattered Spider collaborated with ALPHV in the MGM hack.
edges.evidence_quote: Scattered Spider collaborated with ALPHV , a software development team which provides ransomware as a service.

descriptions: Scattered Spider formed a collective with Lapsus$ and ShinyHunters in 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: A collective of cybercrime groups, including Scattered Spider, Lapsus$ and ShinyHunters was forged in 2025, and has created at least 16 Telegram channels since August 8, 2025.

descriptions: Scattered Spider is affiliated with The Com.
edges.evidence_quote: The group is believed to be affiliated with cybercriminal network, " The Com ", or more specifically the Hacker Com, a subset of The Com.

descriptions: The Little Forty Thieves is an apprentice gang of the original Forty Thieves.
edges.evidence_quote: The juvenile Little Forty Thieves , an apprentice street gang of the original Forty Thieves
